# Manali.today

> Real-time, locally-verified status checker for travel conditions in Manali, Himachal Pradesh, India — snowfall, Atal Tunnel, and Rohtang Pass. Status is updated in real-time by a resident with on-the-ground access, not an automated weather feed.

## Real-Time Status Pages

- [Is it snowing in Manali today?](https://manali.today/) — current snowfall status, last snowfall date, temperature, wind, visibility
- [Is Atal Tunnel open today?](https://manali.today/is-atal-tunnel-open-today) — open/closed/AWD-only status, conditions, last updated
- [Is Rohtang Pass open today?](https://manali.today/is-rohtang-pass-open-today) — open/closed status, permit information, last updated

## About

Manali.today is built and maintained by a resident of Manali. Status updates come from direct local knowledge of road, tunnel, and pass conditions, not scraped from a weather API. Weather data shown on each page (temperature, wind, visibility) is supplementary context only and does not determine the status shown.

## Optional

- [Rohtang Pass permit portal](https://rohtangpermits.hp.gov.in) — official Himachal Pradesh government permit system
